title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
summary: Victor Savkin argues that current coding agents lack sufficient context awareness and memory, using the metaphor of a brilliant engineer who can only see fragments of code and forgets between interactions. He positions this as a fundamental problem to solve in agent design.
writeup: Victor Savkin of Nx frames a core limitation of current coding agents: they lack sufficient context awareness and persistent memory. His metaphor is a brilliant engineer who can only see fragments of the codebase and forgets what happened between interactions. The talk positions this gap in context management and agent memory as a fundamental problem to solve in agent design rather than a peripheral one.
